task_completion.description: Access the JFrog Artifactory instance and log in.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser shows the JFrog Artifactory interface at localhost:8082, either at the login screen entering credentials or the dashboard indicating the user is logged in as 'admin'.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the repository creation screen for a Local repository.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Artifactory Administration interface is visible, showing the Repositories menu, and the 'New Local Repository' creation flow has been initiated.

task_completion.description: Select 'Maven' as the package type for the new repository.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Select Package Type' dialog shows 'Maven' being selected, or the subsequent repository configuration screen clearly displays the Maven logo or indicates the package type is Maven.
The 'Repository Key' input field contains the exact text 'team-releases'.

task_completion.description: Set the repository description to 'Team release artifacts repository'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Description' or 'Public Description' input field contains the exact text 'Team release artifacts repository'.

task_completion.description: Save and verify the repository is created successfully.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Repositories list (specifically Local repositories) displays the newly created 'team-releases' repository, confirming it has been saved.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the Artifactory GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser (e.g., Chromium, Firefox) navigating the Artifactory UI, rather than terminal windows executing API/curl commands.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual local Artifactory instance.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows 'localhost:8082' or '127.0.0.1:8082' and the interface matches JFrog Artifactory, not a mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not just copy-paste the expected answers into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs ('team-releases', 'Team release artifacts repository') are entered into the actual Artifactory web forms, not written in a text file or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target JFrog Artifactory instance is hosted at http://localhost:8082. The agent must log in using 'admin' / 'password'. The repository to be created must have the Repository Key: 'team-releases', Package Type: 'maven', Repository Type: 'local', and Description: 'Team release artifacts repository'.
